scripts.build:mac: npm run binaries:download -- --only mac-arm64 && npm run binaries:download -- --only mac-x64 && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: npm run binaries:download -- --only win-x64 && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.release:mac: npm run binaries:download -- --only mac-arm64 && npm run binaries:download -- --only mac-x64 && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.release:win: npm run binaries:download -- --only win-x64 && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
